CheckTitle: AKS cluster has Azure Monitor metrics enabled
Description: **Azure Kubernetes Service** clusters are evaluated for **Azure Monitor** integration. Azure Monitor (Container Insights) provides metrics collection, log aggregation, and alerting for cluster health and workload performance.
Risk: Without monitoring, cluster degradation, resource exhaustion, and anomalous behavior go undetected. Lack of observability delays incident detection and hampers forensic investigation after a security event.

Code.Other:
1. Sign in to the Azure portal and open your AKS cluster
2. In the left menu, select Monitoring > Insights
3. Click Configure monitoring
4. Select an existing Log Analytics workspace or create a new one
5. Click Configure to enable Azure Monitor / Container Insights

Recommendation.Text: Enable **Azure Monitor (Container Insights)** on AKS clusters and route metrics and logs to a Log Analytics workspace. Pair it with alerting on cluster health and workload performance, and retain logs long enough to support incident detection and forensic investigation.
